itineraries.name: Left Bank Classics Weekend
itineraries.theme: Medoc first and second growths; Pauillac, Saint-Julien and Margaux

days.morning: Arrive Bordeaux; check in at Chateau Cordeillan-Bages hotel (Pauillac); walk the Pauillac quay and Maison du Vin for a first orientation tasting
days.lunch: Cafe Lavinal in Bages village; Lynch-Bages by the glass with Landaise dishes
days.afternoon: Pre-booked visit to Chateau Lynch-Bages cellar and barrel chai; optional upgrade to visit Chateau Mouton Rothschild museum (book months in advance)
days.evening: Drive south along the Route des Chateaux through Saint-Julien; view Ducru-Beaucaillou and Leoville facades at sunset

days.morning: Pre-booked appointment at Chateau Palmer (Margaux); 90-min tour of the biodynamic estate with tasting of current and one back vintage
days.lunch: Wine lunch at Le Chapon Fin bar (Bordeaux city); claret and traditional brasserie food
days.afternoon: L'Intendant tower browsing; optional structured tasting at Bordeaux Wine School (walk-in afternoon slots)
days.evening: Return to Bordeaux city; walk the Chartrons quay; visit Musee du Vin et du Negoce
days.dinner: Restaurant Gabriel at Place de la Bourse (Michelin-starred)

itineraries.name: Saint-Emilion and Pomerol Right Bank Deep Dive
itineraries.theme: Right Bank mastery: Saint-Emilion Premier Grand Cru Classe, Pomerol, Fronsac

days.morning: Arrive Saint-Emilion village; check in at Hostellerie de Plaisance; walk the village with Maison du Vin orientation tasting
days.lunch: Cepage wine bar (Saint-Emilion village) with Right Bank by-the-glass flight
days.afternoon: Guided visit to Chateau Beau-Sejour Becot (Premier Grand Cru Classe B); underground limestone cellars and current vintage tasting
days.evening: Jurade tower views from the village; evening free in Saint-Emilion
days.accommodation: Hostellerie de Plaisance or The Keys at Troplong Mondot

days.morning: Drive to Pomerol; private tour at Vieux Chateau Certan (pre-booked months in advance)
days.lunch: Picnic lunch among Pomerol vines or casual lunch in Libourne centre
days.afternoon: Drive to Fronsac; Chateau de la Riviere cave experience tour and tasting
days.evening: Return to Saint-Emilion; sunset walk around the vineyard plateau
days.dinner: Les Belles Perdrix de Troplong Mondot (Michelin-starred)
days.accommodation: The Keys at Chateau Troplong Mondot

days.morning: Chateau Canon visit (Chanel-owned Premier Grand Cru Classe B; appointment required)
days.lunch: Guided tasting lunch at Saint-Emilion Maison du Vin wine school session
days.afternoon: Drive south to Sauternes; Chateau Rieussec tasting appointment

itineraries.name: Premier Cru and Sauternes Splurge
itineraries.theme: First growths, Sauternes Premier Cru Superieur, and luxury estate dining

days.morning: Arrive Bordeaux; check in at Les Sources de Caudalie (Martillac); Vinotherapie Barrel Bath spa experience
days.lunch: La Grand'Vigne at Les Sources de Caudalie (Michelin-starred)
days.afternoon: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte tour and Pessac-Leognan blanc vertical tasting with winemaker Fabien Teitgen
days.evening: Sunset walk in the estate vineyard; Vinotherapie spa

days.morning: Drive north to Pauillac; pre-booked appointment at Chateau Mouton Rothschild museum and tasting
days.lunch: Cafe Lavinal (Bages village; Cazes family bistro)
days.afternoon: Chateau Pichon-Lalande visit (appointment required); second wine and grand vin comparative tasting

days.morning: Drive south to Sauternes; check in at Hotel Lalique (Chateau Lafaurie-Peyraguey)
days.lunch: Restaurant Lalique at Lafaurie-Peyraguey (two Michelin stars)
days.afternoon: Chateau d'Yquem tasting appointment (book 6+ weeks in advance)
days.evening: Sauternes village walk; visit producer cooperative cellar
days.dinner: Restaurant Lalique tasting menu with Sauternes vertical pairing

days.morning: Morning at leisure; Chateau Rieussec tasting (Sauternes Premier Cru, Rothschild-owned)
days.lunch: Return to Bordeaux city; La Grande Maison de Bernard Magrez (Michelin-starred, wine-cellar lunch)
days.afternoon: Cite du Vin museum and Belvedere tasting bar; closing the loop on Bordeaux wine history
days.dinner: La Grande Maison de Bernard Magrez

verified.address_quoted: Chemin de Smith Haut-Lafitte, 33650 Martillac, France

itineraries.name: Biodynamic Bordeaux Weekend
itineraries.theme: Bordeaux's biodynamic and organic estate pioneers from Pauillac to Margaux

days.morning: Arrive Pauillac; Chateau Pontet-Canet visit (Demeter-certified, 81 hectares); blending workshop experience
days.lunch: Picnic in the Pontet-Canet biodynamic vineyard; hamper from Cafe Lavinal (Bages)
days.afternoon: Chateau Lynch-Bages visit (for contrast with conventional Pauillac); afternoon tasting
days.dinner: Dinner at Cafe Lavinal or local brasserie in Pauillac
days.accommodation: Chateau Cordeillan-Bages or gite near Pauillac

days.morning: Chateau Palmer visit (Demeter-certified since 2017; 66 hectares); full biodynamic cellar tour and current vintage tasting
days.lunch: Wine lunch in Bordeaux city at Le Chapon Fin bar
days.afternoon: Visit Max Bordeaux (Chartrons) for natural Bordeaux selections; Bordeaux natural wine route self-guided
days.evening: Cite du Vin for wine-culture context
days.dinner: Wine Not Bar (Saint-Michel district; natural Bordeaux list)
